ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the study */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat type of the study */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator responsible for the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "climate_conditions" TEXT /* Climate conditions during the study */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality parameters (e.g., pH, temperature, dissolved oxygen) */,
  "study_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the study in days */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, planned) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality assessment of the data collected */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "taxon_name" TEXT /* Taxonomic name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "movement_dimensionality" TEXT /* Movement dimensionality of the species (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  "thermy" TEXT /* Thermal regulation of the species (e.g., ectotherm, endotherm) */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Full scientific name of the species */,
  "habitat_preference" TEXT /* Preferred habitat of the species */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Type of diet (e.g., carnivore, herbivore, omnivore) */,
  "life_stage" TEXT /* Life stage of the species (e.g., juvenile, adult) */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range of the species in centimeters */,
  "behavioral_traits" TEXT /* Behavioral traits of the species (e.g., nocturnal, diurnal) */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., endangered, vulnerable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_consumption" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource consumption measurement */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study that the measurement belongs to */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species that the measurement belongs to */,
  "resource_consumption_rate" REAL /* Resource consumption rate (e.g., number of resources consumed per individual per unit time) */,
  "resource_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the resource consumption rate (e.g., individual/second) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to measure resource consumption */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of individuals sampled */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the resource consumption rate */,
  "environmental_stimuli" TEXT /* Environmental stimuli present during the measurement */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the measurement was taken */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the measurement */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., field observation, laboratory experiment) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., validated, unvalidated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_consumption_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_consumption_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foraging_behavior" (
  "foraging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foraging behavior measurement */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study that the measurement belongs to */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species that the measurement belongs to */,
  "movement_dimensionality" TEXT /* Movement dimensionality of the foraging behavior (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "detection_dimensionality" TEXT /* Detection dimensionality of the foraging behavior (e.g., sphere, cylinder) */,
  "behavioral_pattern" TEXT /* Specific behavioral pattern observed (e.g., stalking, ambush) */,
  "prey_type" TEXT /* Type of prey being foraged */,
  "foraging_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the foraging behavior in minutes */,
  "environmental_stimuli" TEXT /* Environmental stimuli present during the foraging */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the foraging behavior was observed */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the foraging */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., field observation, laboratory experiment) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., validated, unvalidated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foraging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foraging_behavior_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foraging_behavior_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
